column1: # mzpeak-example-data — vendor-raw dataset manifest (drives build_data.sh `vendor` mode).
# The mzML / imzML / sdrf tiles are reconstructed by scripts/fetch-*.sh (curated URLs); this
# manifest covers the VENDOR-RAW tiles. Columns are TAB-separated:
#   tile          data/<tile> subdir lives under here
#   dir           dataset directory under the tile
#   files         ';'-separated DIRECT download URLs, or '-' = no stable direct URL (fetch manually
#                 by accession from `repo` into data/<tile>/<dir>/, see docs/CORPUS.md)
#   unpack        zip | none      (zip = unzip in place after download)
#   convert_input path under data/<tile>/<dir>/ to feed mzpeak-convert

column9: Thermo LTQ Orbitrap Velos (.raw converts cross-platform, needs .NET)
Agilent 6545 Q-TOF; per-run zip LMV_CS_24_h.zip — fetch by accession
Bruker BAF .d (folder on MetaboLights FILES); native reader needs baf2sql_c + TIMSDATA_LIB_DIR
Bruker timsTOF Pro PASEF (.d, TDF — pure-Rust reader)
